sn_aia_tool.description: Searches the Medtric Warranty Policies knowledge base for relevant coverage policy articles.
sn_aia_tool.input_schema: [{"name":"search_terms","description":"Keywords to search for in KB articles (e.g., 'physical damage drop', 'software firmware', 'component failure')","mandatory":true}]
sn_aia_tool.name: Search Warranty Knowledge Base
